name: Wine Cream Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 16x11x1 inch jelly roll pan with aluminum foil and grease it.
3. In a small bowl, beat the eggs until very thick and lemon-colored (about 5 minutes) and pour into a large bowl.
4. Gradually add 1 cup granulated sugar; mix in water and vanilla.
5. Add flour, baking powder, and salt gradually, beating just until batter is smooth. Pour into pan and spread to corners.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Loosen cake from edges of pan; invert onto a towel sprinkled with powdered sugar. Remove foil; trim stiff edges if necessary.
8. While hot, roll the cake and towel beginning at the narrow end.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
10. In a 2-quart saucepan, mix together 1/3 cup granulated sugar and 4 teaspoons cornstarch. Stir in wine. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and boils (about 1 minute).
11. Remove from heat; stir in butter. Refrigerate until chilled.
12. Unroll cake and remove towel. Spread filling over roll to within 1/4 inch of edges; roll up. Refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
13. Mix the reserved cornstarch and lemon juice with strawberry syrup. Heat strawberries and jelly in a saucepan, stirring constantly until boiling (about 2 minutes). Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice.
